# CAT-G-009 — Māori Climate Platform

| Field | Value |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Funder** | Ministry for the Environment |
| **Status** | **Watch** — Stage 2 investments announced; new open rounds TBD |
| **Fit score** | **55** — only if marae/community resilience + edge energy/water |

## Relevance

Stage 2 supports marae resilience (energy, water security, connectivity in emergencies). CAT edge mesh could support **offline comms / water sensing** only with marae-led kaitono.

## Next steps

Monitor Beehive / MfE releases for Stage 3. Do not cold-apply without marae partnership.
